steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
For a random selection, probability equals the ratio of favorable outcomes to total outcomes.

Favorable outcomes (mystery books): 5
Total outcomes (all books): 10
$$P(\text{mystery}) = \frac{\text{number of mystery books}}{\text{total number of books}} = \frac{5}{10}$$

steps.title: Simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Reduce the fraction by dividing both numerator and denominator by 5:
$$\frac{5}{10} = \frac{5 \div 5}{10 \div 5} = \frac{1}{2}$$
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
